field_occurrences.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. This feature is useful when grouping by high cardinality column(s) though does increase the query complexity and cost.

original_field.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. This feature is useful when grouping by high cardinality column(s) though does increase the query complexity and cost.

field_occurrences.description: Groups remaining series into an "Others" category when series limit is reached. This prevents incomplete time series data from being displayed.

original_field.description: Groups remaining series into an "Others" category when series limit is reached. This prevents incomplete time series data from being displayed.

field_occurrences.description: Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).

original_field.description: Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).

descriptions: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. occurrences.description: Enable data zooming controls

original_field.description: Enable data zooming controls

Query.description: Dimension to use on x-axis.
Query.enum_source: datasource columns; xAxisMixin 会在 granularity_sqla 已存在且 x_axis 为空时回填

Query.description: Select a time grain for the visualization. The grain is the time interval represented by a single point on the chart.
Treat values as categorical.
Decides which column or measure to sort the base axis by.
Query.enum_source: 当前 x_axis、metrics、timeseries_limit_metric 和 SORT_SERIES_CHOICES 的动态组合

Query.description: Whether to sort ascending or descending on the base Axis.
Select one or many metrics to display. You can use an aggregation function on a column or write custom SQL to create a metric.

Dimensions contain qualitative values such as names, dates, or geographical data. Use dimensions to categorize, segment, and reveal the details in your data. Dimensions affect the level of detail in the view.
Calculate contribution per series or row
源码未提供额外描述；字段标签为 Filters。
Query.enum_source: dataset columns + saved metrics + 当前 metrics

Query.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. This feature is useful when grouping by high cardinality column(s) though does increase the query complexity and cost.
Groups remaining series into an "Others" category when series limit is reached. This prevents incomplete time series data from being displayed.

Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).
If enabled, this control sorts the results/values descending, otherwise it sorts the results ascending.
Limits the number of the rows that are computed in the query that is the source of the data used for this chart.
Whether to truncate metrics
Show empty columns

Advanced analytics.description: Defines a rolling window function to apply, works along with the [Periods] text box
Defines the size of the rolling window function, relative to the time granularity selected
The minimum number of rolling periods required to show a value.
Overlay one or more timeseries from a relative time period. Expects relative time deltas in natural language. Free text is supported.
How to display time shifts: as individual lines; as the difference between the main time series and each time shift; as the percentage change; or as the ratio between series and time shifts.

Predictive Analytics.description: How many periods into the future do we want to predict
Width of the confidence interval. Should be between 0 and 1
Should yearly seasonality be applied. An integer value will specify Fourier order of seasonality.
Should weekly seasonality be applied. An integer value will specify Fourier order of seasonality.
Should daily seasonality be applied. An integer value will specify Fourier order of seasonality.

Chart Title.description: 源码未提供额外描述；字段标签为 X Axis Title。
源码未提供额外描述；字段标签为 X Axis Title Margin。
源码未提供额外描述；字段标签为 Y Axis Title。
源码未提供额外描述；字段标签为 Y Axis Title Margin。
源码未提供额外描述；字段标签为 Y Axis Title Position。

Chart Options / Series Order.description: Based on what should series be ordered on the chart and legend

Chart Options / General.description: The color scheme for rendering chart
When unchecked, colors from the selected color scheme will be used for time shifted series
Series chart type (line, bar etc)
Opacity of Area Chart. Also applies to confidence band.
Show series values on the chart
Stack series on top of each other
Chart Options / General.notes: controlPanel 默认值是 null；Timeseries/DEFAULT_FORM_DATA 的 runtime fallback 为 false。

Chart Options / General.description: Only show the total value on the stacked chart, and not show on the selected category
Chart Options / General.notes: controlPanel 默认值是 true；Timeseries/DEFAULT_FORM_DATA 的 runtime fallback 为 false。

Chart Options / General.description: Minimum threshold in percentage points for showing labels.
源码未提供额外描述；字段标签为 Extra Controls。
Draw a marker on data points. Only applicable for line types.
Size of marker. Also applies to forecast observations.
Show minor ticks on axes.
Enable data zooming controls

Chart Options / Legend.description: Whether to display a legend for the chart

Chart Options / X Axis.description: D3 time format syntax: https://github.com/d3/d3-time-format. When using other than adaptive formatting, labels may overlap
Input field supports custom rotation. e.g. 30 for 30°
Choose how many X-Axis labels to show
Truncate X Axis. Can be overridden by specifying a min or max bound. Only applicable for numerical X axis.

Bounds for numerical X axis. Not applicable for temporal or categorical axes. When left empty, the bounds are dynamically defined based on the min/max of the data. Note that this feature will only expand the axis range. It won't narrow the data's extent.

Chart Options / Tooltip.description: Shows a list of all series available at that point in time
Whether to display the total value in the tooltip
Whether to display the percentage value in the tooltip
Whether to sort tooltip by the selected metric in descending order.
Tooltip time format; shared control derives from x_axis_time_format.

Chart Options / Y Axis.enum_source: D3_FORMAT_OPTIONS; comparison_type=percentage 时仅保留百分比格式

Chart Options / Y Axis.description: Draw split lines for minor y-axis ticks
Truncate Y Axis. Can be overridden by specifying a min or max bound.
Bounds for the Y-axis. When left empty, the bounds are dynamically defined based on the min/max of the data. Note that this feature will only expand the axis range. It won't narrow the data's extent.

notes: 字段名优先取 controlPanel 配置中的 name；如 transformProps/types 中确认了 camelCase 运行时别名，则补充 runtime_alias。
default_value 优先记录 controlPanel 默认值；若 transformProps 的 DEFAULT_FORM_DATA 存在不同 fallback，会写入 notes。
sample_data 优先取源码里的 control 默认值、枚举 options、测试夹具和 Storybook args；若源码没有提供某个字段的具体 payload 字面量，则只保留一个与字段类型一致的最小合法示例，不把它当成功能性默认值。
embedding 仅在字段命中 superset-ui-core/query/constants.ts 的 extra_form_data append/override 白名单时标记为可用。
